title: Motion Blur Crowd Street Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Motion Blur Crowd Street Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic urban street portrait where adult woman with short tousled hair and calm introspective gaze remains razor-sharp while a flowing crowd becomes dreamy long-exposure motion blur. Subject: adult woman with short tousled hair and calm introspective gaze wears soft beige knit sweater, textured brown skirt, and minimal earrings and holds quiet, centered, slightly melancholic, standing still as the only fully sharp emotional anchor in the frame. Scene: busy crosswalk near old brick storefronts filled with passing pedestrians rendered as soft motion trails, creating contrast between public rush and the subject’s stillness. Composition: 35mm street portrait with the subject centered or near-centered, full attention on the sharp face and wardrobe, crowd movement wrapping around them, shallow depth of field, and clear foreground-to-background separation. Signature Elements: Preserved motion blur crowd street portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Hyper-realistic cinematic film photography with emotionally evocative stillness, natural street texture, restrained editorial polish, and dreamy long-exposure crowd movement. Color Palette: Muted earthy tones, soft beige and brown wardrobe accents, natural city neutrals, and gentle daylight contrast without heavy saturation. Lighting: Soft natural daylight with subtle highlights on the sharp subject, blurred ambient crowd light, and film-like tonal rolloff. Camera: 35mm lens at f/1.8, shallow depth of field, subject tack sharp, surrounding pedestrians motion-blurred, realistic street perspective. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
